scripts.build: pnpm --filter @srrm/shared build && pnpm --filter @srrm/worker build && pnpm --filter @srrm/web build
scripts.deploy: pnpm --filter web build && wrangler deploy --cwd apps/worker
scripts.deploy:preview: pnpm --filter web build && wrangler deploy --cwd apps/worker --env preview
scripts.typecheck: pnpm --filter @srrm/worker tsc --noEmit && pnpm --filter @srrm/shared tsc --noEmit && pnpm --filter @srrm/web tsc --noEmit
